<!-- Thank you for contributing! Please review the checklist below. -->

## Summary

<!-- Brief description of what this PR does. -->

## Type

- [ ] `feat` — new rule or functionality
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — test additions or fixes
- [ ] `refactor` — code restructure, no behavior change
- [ ] `chore` — CI, deps, tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`PYTHONPATH=src pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New rules have at least one test that proves they fire
- [ ] No secret values committed (run `skillcheck .` on this branch)
- [ ] Commit message follows conventional commits
- [ ] If adding a dependency, it is justified and pinned in `pyproject.toml`

## Breaking Changes

<!-- If this PR introduces breaking changes, describe them and how to migrate. -->
